description: Style NoteTonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a feminine and pleated look, this Peach-coloured top has sleeveless styling, designed with a loose and a dipped curved cut hem with tiers, straps with a cross over look at the backMaterial and Care100% polyesterHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
